sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الْوَلَدُ مِنْ أُمِّهِ أَنْ تَطْبُخَ الشُّوربَةَ.
sentences.translation: Dječak je zamolio majku da skuha supu.
sentences.translationEn: The boy asked his mother to cook soup.

sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: U redu, skuhat ću ti je.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Alright, I will cook it for you.

sentences.translation: Skuhala je supu s povrćem i piletinom.
sentences.translationEn: She cooked the soup with vegetables and chicken.

sentences.translation: Dječak je pojeo supu i osjetio toplinu.
sentences.translationEn: The boy ate the soup and felt warm.
